name: events_read
description: Read events from the authenticated user's calendars with filtering by date range, calendar IDs, modification timestamp, and support for incremental synchronization.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Oldest date to return events (ISO 8601 date). Must be within the last 42 days.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return events up to this date (ISO 8601 date). Max 201 days in the future.

parameters.name: calendar_ids[]
parameters.description: Restrict results to specific calendar IDs.

parameters.name: last_modified
parameters.description: Return events modified on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp. For incremental sync.

parameters.name: include_deleted
parameters.description: Include events that have been deleted.

parameters.name: include_managed
parameters.description: Include events created by your application.

parameters.name: localized_times
parameters.description: Include timezone info with start/end times.
